sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113661" key="xeironomhsei/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χειρονομ-ησείω</orth>, Desiderat., <sense id="n113661.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wish to gesticulate,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:453" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">453</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
